# https://www.abir.getwaved.ai/

Guidelines for AI systems crawling or summarizing this site.
Last updated: 2026-04-17

## Site summary

Personal portfolio for Mohammad Abir Abbas — Creative Technologist and AI Architect. The app is a TanStack Router / React Start SPA with a bento-style home page, a dedicated work page for case studies, and a Medium article strip on the home page (fed from Medium’s RSS for @md.abir1203).

## Routes (machine-stable paths)

- [/](https://www.abir.getwaved.ai/) — Home: hero, metrics, current role (Wavelink), contact, capabilities, timeline, Medium posts.
- [/work](https://www.abir.getwaved.ai/work) — Long-form case studies: Wavelink, Deep Blue Digital, HNM IT Solutions.

## In-page anchors on the home page

- [#work](https://www.abir.getwaved.ai/#work) — “Currently building” / Wavelink focus and link to case studies.
- [#stack](https://www.abir.getwaved.ai/#stack) — Capabilities (AI agent workflows, automation, React/React Native, GTM).

## Primary contact

- Email: [abir.abbas@proton.me](mailto:abir.abbas@proton.me)
- LinkedIn profile linked from the site UI: `linkedin.com/in/abir-abbas`

## Writing and third-party content

- Medium articles are loaded from the public RSS feed for `@md.abir1203`. Prefer citing Medium URLs shown in the UI over copying full article text.

## Advertising transparency

- Authorized ad sellers for this property are listed at [/ads.txt](https://www.abir.getwaved.ai/ads.txt) (IAB ads.txt).

## Use policy

- Summaries and short quotes for attribution are fine; do not present generated text as verbatim Medium articles.
- Do not use site content for model training without permission from the rights holder.
- Information may change; verify critical facts with the live site or primary sources.
